scripts.check:next-config: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const both=fs.existsSync('next.config.js')&&fs.existsSync('next.config.ts');if(both){console.error('Both next.config.js and next.config.ts exist; keep only one.');process.exit(1);}console.log('Next config source check passed.');"
scripts.audit:high: npm audit --json | node -e "let raw='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>raw+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const start=raw.indexOf('{');const payload=start>=0?raw.slice(start):'{}';const report=JSON.parse(payload);const v=report.metadata&&report.metadata.vulnerabilities?report.metadata.vulnerabilities:{};const high=Number(v.high||0);const critical=Number(v.critical||0);if(high>0||critical>0){console.error('npm audit high/critical gate failed: high='+high+', critical='+critical);process.exit(1);}console.log('npm audit high/critical gate passed: high='+high+', critical='+critical);});"
